product_type: Truck Data Form (Single Axle Rear) - Frame Lift Point Version

specifications.units: All dimensions to be entered in inches

features: Dimensional data collection form for single axle rear trucks with frame engagement lifting
Includes side view, top view, front view, and rear view diagrams
Shows lift point location on frame
Captures tire diameters, minimum ground clearance, overall length, and vehicle weight
Top view shows frame rail and tire positions
notes: Please be complete in entering dimensional data - determination in suiting lifting requirements is only as accurate and complete as the data received
Note any areas that may cause problems in vehicle lifting
All dimensions to be entered in inches
Unless otherwise specified, surface finish to be 125 RMS
Welding medium shall conform to AWS specifications to E-70XX electrodes or E-70TI code 5.3 flux core wire only
